message:
fix: address Copilot review comments on FeatureRequestModal refactor (#8759)

- Add toast notifications for error feedback in handleRequestUpdate and
  handleCloseRequest (previously only set actionError without user-visible toast)
- Guard against null token in handleCheckPreview to avoid sending
  "Bearer null" in Authorization header
- Clear success display setTimeout on component unmount to prevent
  state updates on unmounted component
- Add tabIndex={-1} and auto-focus to ScreenshotPreviewOverlay so the
  overlay can receive Escape key events

Fixes #8756

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
